'''wodasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twenties|twenties]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twenties|twenties]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wodasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodasithi|wodasithi]] || [[word:wodasiji|wodasiji]] || [[word:wodasishi|wodasishi]] || [[word:wodasiki|wodasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodasuthuthu|wodasuthuthu]] || [[word:wodasujuju|wodasujuju]] || [[word:wodasushushu|wodasushushu]] || [[word:wodasukuku|wodasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodasuthu|wodasuthu]] || [[word:wodasuju|wodasuju]] || [[word:wodasushu|wodasushu]] || [[word:wodasuku|wodasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodasufthuf|wodasufthuf]] || [[word:wodasufjuf|wodasufjuf]] || [[word:wodasufshuf|wodasufshuf]] || [[word:wodasufkuf|wodasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodasethe|wodasethe]] || [[word:wodaseje|wodaseje]] || [[word:wodaseshe|wodaseshe]] || [[word:wodaseke|wodaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodasothotho|wodasothotho]] || [[word:wodasojojo|wodasojojo]] || [[word:wodasoshosho|wodasoshosho]] || [[word:wodasokoko|wodasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodasotho|wodasotho]] || [[word:wodasojo|wodasojo]] || [[word:wodasosho|wodasosho]] || [[word:wodasoko|wodasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodasofthof|wodasofthof]] || [[word:wodasofjof|wodasofjof]] || [[word:wodasofshof|wodasofshof]] || [[word:wodasofkof|wodasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfthÃŸf|wodasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfjÃŸf|wodasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfshÃŸf|wodasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfkÃŸf|wodasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wodasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wodasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wodasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wodasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfthÃŸf|wodasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfjÃŸf|wodasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfshÃŸf|wodasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfkÃŸf|wodasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfthÃŸf|wodasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfjÃŸf|wodasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfshÃŸf|wodasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wodasÃŸfkÃŸf|wodasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodasÃḊthÃḊ|wodasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wodasÃḊjÃḊ|wodasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wodasÃḊshÃḊ|wodasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wodasÃḊkÃḊ|wodasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodasathatha|wodasathatha]] || [[word:wodasajaja|wodasajaja]] || [[word:wodasashasha|wodasashasha]] || [[word:wodasakaka|wodasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodasatha|wodasatha]] || [[word:wodasaja|wodasaja]] || [[word:wodasasha|wodasasha]] || [[word:wodasaka|wodasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodasafthaf|wodasafthaf]] || [[word:wodasafjaf|wodasafjaf]] || [[word:wodasafshaf|wodasafshaf]] || [[word:wodasafkaf|wodasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wodasasha|wodasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodashÃḋsha|wodashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodasrosha|wodasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodasmusha|wodasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodasyasha|wodasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodasnkshÃḋsha|gowodasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodasnkrosha|gowodasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodasnkmusha|gowodasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodasnkyasha|gowodasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wodadasasha|wodadasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodadashÃḋsha|wodadashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodadasrosha|wodadasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodadasmusha|wodadasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodadasyasha|wodadasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodadasnkshÃḋsha|gowodadasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodadasnkrosha|gowodadasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodadasnkmusha|gowodadasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodadasnkyasha|gowodadasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wedÃḊsasha|wedÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wedÃḊshÃḋsha|wedÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wedÃḊsrosha|wedÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wedÃḊsmusha|wedÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wedÃḊsyasha|wedÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowedÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gowedÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowedÃḊsnkrosha|gowedÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowedÃḊsnkmusha|gowedÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowedÃḊsnkyasha|gowedÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wodfasasha|wodfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodfashÃḋsha|wodfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodfasrosha|wodfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodfasmusha|wodfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodfasyasha|wodfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodfasnkshÃḋsha|gowodfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodfasnkrosha|gowodfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodfasnkmusha|gowodfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodfasnkyasha|gowodfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
